sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value DOUBLE, tags ARRAY<STRING>);
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, NULL) AS const_null FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, NULL) AS const_null FROM test_table WHERE [1, 2, 3] && tags;
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table WHERE value < 0)) AS const_edge FROM test_table;
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, (SELECT NULL)) AS const_with_null FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING const_with_null IS NULL;
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, (SELECT NULLIF(SUM(value), 0) FROM test_table WHERE id = test_table.id)) AS sum_null FROM test_table;
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2) && tags = ['a', 'd'])) AS multi_check FROM test_table;
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, value + 1) AS increment_const FROM test_table ORDER BY constant_or_null(value, NULL) DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, constant_or_null(value, NULL) AS nullable_value FROM temp_table WHERE [value] && ['c', 'd'] AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_table) > 0;
